name: Google Gemini
shortDescription: Google's most capable AI model with multimodal understanding and real-time information.
fullDescription: Google Gemini represents Google's flagship AI assistant, built on cutting-edge Gemini 2.0 and 2.5 models. It excels at multimodal tasks, processing text, images, audio, and video simultaneously. The free tier offers Gemini 2.0 Flash with real-time Google Search integration. Gemini Advanced unlocks the more powerful 2.5 Pro model, Deep Research capabilities, and Canvas for interactive collaboration. With support for over 40 languages and deep Google Workspace integration, Gemini is a versatile AI companion for professionals, students, and creators.

faq.question: Is Google Gemini free?
faq.answer: Yes, Gemini offers a robust free tier with access to Gemini 2.0 Flash, Google Search integration, and multimodal capabilities.

seoTitle: Google Gemini: AI Assistant with Real-Time Search & Multimodal Intelligence
seoDescription: Experience Google's most capable AI. Multimodal understanding, real-time search, and 1M token context. Free tier available with Gemini 2.0 Flash.

name: Ideogram
shortDescription: AI image generator with exceptional text rendering and typography capabilities.
fullDescription: Ideogram has revolutionized AI image generation by solving the industry's biggest challenge: rendering readable text within images. While other generators produce garbled letters, Ideogram excels at creating posters, logos, memes, and marketing materials with clear typography. With 25 free generations daily, it's accessible for casual users, while paid plans unlock higher limits and commercial usage rights. For designers and marketers who need text-perfect visuals, Ideogram is the undisputed leader.

name: Codeium
shortDescription: Free AI coding assistant with autocomplete, chat, and powerful IDE integration.
cons: Limited context window compared to Cursor
fullDescription: Codeium is a free AI-powered coding assistant that provides unlimited code autocomplete across 70+ programming languages and 70+ IDEs. Unlike competitors that limit free usage, Codeium offers truly unlimited autocomplete for individual developers. The standout feature is natural language search—describe what you're looking for in plain English and Codeium finds relevant code in your codebase. For developers seeking a free, privacy-respecting alternative to Copilot, Codeium is the clear choice.

name: Gamma
shortDescription: AI-powered presentation tool that creates stunning, interactive decks from text prompts.
fullDescription: Gamma reimagines presentations for the AI era—instead of building slides manually, type a prompt and Gamma generates a complete, beautifully designed narrative. The AI creates slide structure, writes copy, and generates custom images. Gamma is perfect for sales decks, pitch decks, and creative portfolios. The free tier offers 400 AI credits monthly, while paid plans unlock unlimited use and custom branding.

name: OpusClip
shortDescription: AI video repurposing tool that turns long videos into viral short clips automatically.
useCases: Create YouTube Shorts from long videos
features: AI-generated captions with emoji and keyword highlighting
fullDescription: OpusClip is the leading AI video repurposing platform that automatically transforms long-form content like podcasts, webinars, and interviews into engaging short-form clips optimized for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels. The AI analyzes your video to find the most compelling moments, adds animated captions with emoji highlights, and reframes content for vertical viewing. Content creators report 5x engagement on AI-clipped videos versus manual edits. The free tier processes 60 minutes monthly with watermarks, while paid plans remove watermarks and add AI B-roll and 4K exports.

features: Real-time web search for technical topics
fullDescription: Phind is an AI search engine built specifically for developers, offering free, unlimited access to powerful AI models including Phind-70B. Unlike general chatbots, Phind is optimized for technical queries—debugging code, researching libraries, and understanding complex documentation. It combines AI reasoning with real-time web search to provide accurate, up-to-date answers with source citations.

After each meeting, Fathom generates instant summaries and creates AI highlights of key moments you can share with your team.

Content creators, musicians, and hobbyists use Suno for everything from podcast intros to full album creation.

For professionals tired of fighting with PowerPoint's formatting, Beautiful.ai is a game-changer.

name: QuillBot
shortDescription: AI paraphrasing and writing tool that helps improve clarity, tone, and style.
features: Multiple paraphrasing modes (Standard, Fluency, Formal, etc.)
fullDescription: QuillBot is an AI-powered writing assistant specializing in paraphrasing and improving text clarity. It offers multiple modes including Standard, Fluency, Formal, Simple, and Creative. The free tier allows paraphrasing up to 125 words at a time. Premium unlocks unlimited words, all modes, a plagiarism checker, and the Co-writer for long-form content. Students and academics particularly value QuillBot for avoiding plagiarism while maintaining original meaning.

name: Hugging Face Chat
shortDescription: Free AI chatbot powered by open-source models from the Hugging Face community. No signup required.
cons: Can be slower than commercial alternatives
fullDescription: Hugging Face Chat provides free access to state-of-the-art open-source AI models without requiring an account or subscription. Users can chat with popular models like Llama, Mistral, and various community-trained models. It's ideal for those who value privacy, want to try different AI models, or need quick AI assistance without signing up. As part of the Hugging Face ecosystem, it represents the open-source alternative to proprietary AI chatbots, keeping AI accessible to everyone.

name: Playground AI
shortDescription: Free AI image creator with canvas-based editing and mixed image generation. 500 images/day free.
fullDescription: Playground AI is a free AI image generator offering an exceptionally generous free tier of 500 images daily. Its standout feature is the canvas-based editor that allows mixed image generation—combining AI-generated elements with uploaded images on an infinite canvas. Users can erase parts of images, expand beyond original boundaries, and blend multiple concepts seamlessly. The free tier makes it accessible for casual creators and professionals alike, while paid plans unlock private mode and higher quality. For designers and artists who need a flexible, free AI image tool, Playground AI is an excellent choice.

name: Scalenut
shortDescription: AI SEO and content marketing platform for research, writing, and optimization.
pros: Cruise Mode for fast article creation
fullDescription: Scalenut is an AI-powered SEO and content marketing platform that streamlines the entire content creation process from research to optimization. Its standout feature, Cruise Mode, generates comprehensive 1500+ word articles in minutes. The platform offers keyword clustering, competitor analysis, and real-time SEO scoring to ensure content ranks well. The free tier allows exploration of basic features, while paid plans unlock unlimited AI words and advanced SEO tools. For marketers and content teams focused on SEO performance, Scalenut offers a complete solution.

fullDescription: Udio is an AI music generation platform that creates stunning, emotionally expressive songs complete with vocals. Developed by former Google DeepMind researchers, Udio excels at capturing the nuances and expressiveness of human singing. Users can generate music in virtually any style—from classical to hip-hop, jazz to electronic. The free tier provides 600 monthly credits for experimentation, while paid plans unlock commercial usage and extended song lengths. For musicians, content creators, and anyone exploring AI-generated music, Udio offers a powerful creative tool.

The free tier includes unlimited autocomplete and 20 chat messages monthly. For enterprise teams, Cody offers SSO, audit logs, and private instance deployment. It's particularly powerful for organizations with large, complex codebases.

name: Replicate
shortDescription: Run AI models in the cloud with one line of code. Access 25,000+ open-source models.
cons: Can be expensive for high volume
fullDescription: Replicate is a cloud platform that makes it incredibly easy to run machine learning models with a single line of code. With access to over 25,000 open-source models covering image generation, video creation, audio synthesis, and more, developers can integrate AI capabilities without managing infrastructure. New users get $5 free credit to experiment. The pay-as-you-go pricing means you only pay for what you use. Popular use cases include building image generation apps, video processing pipelines, and custom AI features.

name: Pi
shortDescription: Personal AI assistant designed for supportive, friendly conversations and emotional intelligence. Completely free.
fullDescription: Pi (Personal Intelligence) by Inflection AI is a conversational AI designed to be kind, supportive, and emotionally intelligent. Unlike task-focused assistants, Pi excels at friendly conversation, offering a judgment-free space to discuss ideas, practice languages, or simply chat. The voice mode enables natural spoken conversations. Available on web, mobile apps, and messaging platforms like WhatsApp and Messenger, Pi is always accessible. Completely free with no usage limits, Pi represents a new category of AI companions focused on emotional connection rather than productivity.

name: SeaArt
shortDescription: Free AI art generator with anime, realistic, and custom model support. 200 free generations daily.
fullDescription: SeaArt is a free AI art generation platform specializing in anime, realistic portraits, and custom character creation. With over 3,000 community-trained models, users can generate highly specific styles from photorealistic portraits to anime characters. The free tier provides 200 daily coins (approximately 20 images), making it accessible for casual creators. Advanced features include ControlNet for pose control, image-to-image editing, and batch generation. Popular among anime artists, game designers, and content creators looking for character art and illustrations.

fullDescription: You.com is a privacy-first AI search engine that gives users control over their search experience without tracking or selling data. The platform offers Smart Agents for specialized tasks like coding, writing, and research. Unlike competitors, You.com prioritizes user privacy while delivering comprehensive, AI-enhanced answers. The free tier provides robust search and basic AI features, while YouPro unlocks unlimited AI chats and advanced capabilities.

The free tier offers 25 monthly generative credits for experimentation, while Premium plans unlock higher resolutions and commercial usage rights. Seamless integration with Premiere Pro, After Effects, and Adobe Express makes it a natural choice for creative professionals already in the Adobe ecosystem.
